items.nameZh: 海疆導師・環境影響評估師
items.positivePrompt: Original fictional Senior Environmental Impact Assessor for an offshore-wind strategy card game; full-body character key art, neutral confident stance, head-to-toe visible; 敏銳、同理、尊重自然; carrying ecology monitor and avian radar; professional technical attire with task-appropriate PPE, institution-free insignia; navy, ivory, muted gold; Taiwan-Strait-inspired maritime environment; cinematic semi-realistic anime aesthetic with luminous atmospheric lighting, naturalistic faces, meticulous industrial detail, realistic proportions and PPE; vertical 2:3 full-bleed composition; keep face, hands and essential tools inside a 12 percent safe zone; source artwork only, designed for a separate runtime card-frame overlay; no resemblance to any real person or institution. Character direction is locked: one original fictional adult woman, cute and approachable but clearly competent and professional, with natural adult facial and body proportions, credible task-appropriate PPE and a non-sexualized presentation. Engineering background accuracy is mandatory. Every visible offshore wind turbine must be a conventional modern three-bladed horizontal-axis wind turbine. Each complete rotor has exactly three smooth, tapered aerodynamic blades attached to one centered hub and evenly spaced 120 degrees apart. Blade curvature must remain continuous and structurally plausible, with consistent length, taper, perspective and attachment at the blade roots. The nacelle must sit correctly on one tower with a plausible offshore foundation and access platform. Keep rotors visually separated from the character and from other turbines. Prefer a few clearly readable turbines; if a rotor would be heavily occluded or cropped, omit that turbine rather than inventing partial geometry.
